body.processed:
William Harrison co-founded Ledger & Associates in 1995 with a vision of building an accounting firm that treats every client with the same level of care and expertise, regardless of the size of their business or the complexity of their return. As Managing Partner, he sets the firm's strategic direction while maintaining an active client practice focused on business advisory and tax planning for closely held businesses.

With over 35 years of experience, William has guided hundreds of business owners through critical financial decisions, from startup financing to succession planning and business sales. He is known for his ability to translate complex tax and financial concepts into plain language, empowering his clients to make informed decisions with confidence.

William is active in the local business community, serving on the boards of the Chamber of Commerce and the Small Business Development Center. He is a frequent speaker on tax planning and business strategy at industry events.

body.processed:
Elena Ramirez is a Partner at Ledger & Associates and the firm's individual tax practice leader. With over 20 years of experience in tax preparation and planning, she specializes in complex individual returns, including those involving investment portfolios, real estate holdings, stock compensation, and multi-state filings.

Elena is an Enrolled Agent, authorized to represent taxpayers before the Internal Revenue Service. She has successfully resolved hundreds of IRS audits, notices, and collections matters, earning a reputation for her thoroughness and her calm, reassuring approach to what can be a stressful process.

She is passionate about financial literacy and volunteers her time leading free tax preparation workshops for underserved communities through the VITA (Volunteer Income Tax Assistance) program.

body.processed:
David Chang is a Senior CPA at Ledger & Associates with specialized expertise in audit, assurance, and forensic accounting. A Certified Fraud Examiner, he brings a meticulous analytical eye to every engagement, helping businesses identify financial risks, strengthen internal controls, and maintain regulatory compliance.

David leads the firm's audit and assurance practice, serving nonprofit organizations, employee benefit plans, and government-funded entities that require independent audits. He is also the go-to advisor for clients navigating complex regulatory requirements, including Sarbanes-Oxley compliance and nonprofit reporting standards.

Before joining Ledger & Associates, David spent seven years at a Big Four accounting firm, where he audited publicly traded companies in the technology and financial services sectors. He brings that institutional rigor to his work with the firm's clients.
